untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'price momentum over past 15 days in bottom 25th percentile' which requires percentile-based calculation over a lookback window. The allowed indicators do not include a generic momentum indicator or percentile function. While returns can approximate short-term momentum, expressing the 25th percentile threshold requires a rolling percentile calculation not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Partial translation: Entry uses 15-day log_returns approximating negative momentum (bottom 25th percentile estimated as -10% decline per parameters) combined with vol_ratio_20 < 0.40 to capture below-40th-percentile volume. Exit conditions translated to: exit after 3 days (hold_days_max) OR when returns > 5% (recovery to within ~5% of entry). The momentum percentile condition cannot be fully expressed with allowed indicators and would require custom percentile calculation logic.
